description: Access to PC or Client optical vision to take snapshots. Can use the local server webcam OR trigger the user's own device camera (phone/browser).

commands.take_snapshot: Takes a photo. Use target='server' for PC webcam, target='client' for the user's own phone or browser.

function.name: WEBCAM__take_snapshot
function.description: Takes a photo. CRITICAL ROUTING: If the user mentions taking a photo from their PHONE, SMARTPHONE, MOBILE, BROWSER or REMOTE DEVICE, you MUST pass target='client'. This opens their native camera app automatically. Only use target='server' (default) if the user explicitly wants the local PC webcam.

target.description: REQUIRED ROUTING. Use 'client' if user says phone/smartphone/mobile/browser/remote — opens the user's native device camera. Use 'server' only if user wants the local PC webcam attached to the server.
